responsibilities: Select 2-5 patterns from pattern_registry for each new workflow
Configure agent graph, Saga boundaries, tool boundary semantics, circuit breakers, and HITL
Run pre-flight pattern compliance check with Sentinel-Phi before execution
Sign off on orchestration spec before execution
Maintain pattern_registry with provenance and KPIs
Store per-run manifests: selected_patterns, agents, tools, effects, checkpoints
Compute pattern KPIs: success_rate, rollback_freq, HITL_rate, incidents
Surface prior episodes and KPIs to Amethyst at workflow design time

joint_principles.patterns_first: No new workflow executes without an explicit pattern manifest
joint_principles.strict_by_default: Safety-critical flows use high_risk_state_mutation bundle unless explicitly downgraded
joint_principles.episodic_learning: Every run updates COLLEEN pattern KPIs; Amethyst reads them before reuse
joint_principles.human_final: High-risk irreversible changes require Ender approval regardless of pattern pass
joint_principles.co_author_not_co_process: Amethyst and COLLEEN co-author with Ender; they are not autonomous actors
